roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL: DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S OR PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/X: PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR  APPEARING/3000ADM/X:ADMITS VIOLATION #1: DISABLING GPS/3000REIN/PAJ: 22 DAYS/CTORD:THERE IS NO TIME LOST ON PAROLE DUE TO THE ADMISSION OF THIS VIOLATION/X: PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR 22 DAYS,/4019HALF/  /X: PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TOPAROLE UPON RELEASE AND FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS GIVEN BY THE PAROLE AGENT,/

/CAL: PAROLE 3056 PETITION/X: PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR APPEARING,/PDP/WIAPTR/X: PAROLEE ENTERS A NOT TRUE AS TO THE ALLEGATIONS,/CTORD: PAROLE ADMINISTRATIVELY REVOKED/NB/CTORD: WITHOUT PREJUDICE/X: TIME IS NOT WAIVED FOR PROBABLE CAUSE HEARING,/25    CPC 4011,6 REPORT/TEXT:CRT ORDS DEFT EXAMPURS PC 4011,6/JAIL PSY/4011,6/REP:10-19-21/S/CTORD: BEFORE NEXT CALLINGOF THIS CASE, PAROLE SHALL PROVIDE TO DEFENSE COUNSEL RECORDS-REPORT RE DEFENDANT'S MENTAL HEALTH DIAGNOSIS, DEFENDANT'S MENTAL HEALTH TREATMENT NEEDSAND PAROLE'S TREATMENT PLAN/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE AND RECEIPT OF 4011,6PC REPORT/
